originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Profiling and Optimizing PufferLib Training Loop to 1.5 Million Steps
summary: Profiled the PufferLib training loop, identified bottlenecks in sorting training data and copy operations, and implemented fixes including using numpy sort and asynchronous device transfers. Achieved a speedup from ~1M to 1.5M steps per second, with remaining overhead in LSTM forward pass.
